metadata.description: Israel's plugin marketplace, dual format for Codex and Claude Code / Cowork.

plugins.name: agent-ops
plugins.description: Design, route, and audit reusable agent systems on Claude Code, Claude Cowork, and Codex, with explicit authority, evidence, stops, and failure behavior.

plugins.name: brand-world-studio
plugins.description: Brand briefs, visual systems, image-model routing, production prompt packs, and consistency verification.

plugins.name: capability-operator
plugins.description: Capability routing, read-only inventories, overlap audits, portfolio governance, skill creation, and fresh-task discovery proof on Claude Code, Claude Cowork, or Codex.

plugins.name: citizen-forge
plugins.description: Governed internal application creation for non-technical owners, with deterministic policy and lifecycle controls.

plugins.name: continuity-vault
plugins.description: Source-preserving extraction, knowledge promotion, graph routing, recall, and staleness auditing across Claude Code, Claude Cowork, and Codex sessions.

plugins.name: data-storytelling-studio
plugins.description: Routes checked analysis into decision-facing visual stories, executive readouts, reports, decks, dashboards, and publishable sites.

plugins.name: founder-revenue-engine
plugins.description: Signal research, ICP definition, commercial narrative, bounded outreach drafts, and founder-led content on Claude Code, Claude Cowork, or Codex.

plugins.name: harness-engineering
plugins.description: Design, build, verify, and maintain a personalized AI operating harness on Claude Code, Claude Cowork, or Codex through a source-first interview and reversible guided workflow.

plugins.name: knowledge-work-superpowers
plugins.description: A disciplined workflow system for research, analysis, writing, review, and evidence-backed delivery.

plugins.name: loopkit
plugins.description: Design, run, verify, resume, schedule, and diagnose bounded loops on Claude Code, Claude Cowork, and Codex with durable host-scoped state and evidence-gated completion.

plugins.name: matt-partok-bundled-plugin-for-knowledge-work
plugins.description: A Codex-native adaptation of Matt Pocock's complete promoted workflow, extended for coding and general knowledge work.

plugins.name: model-evaluation-lab
plugins.description: Plans reproducible model evaluations, normalizes benchmark runs, and produces measured model-selection decisions.

plugins.name: model-prompt-lab
plugins.description: Verified model routing, production prompt architecture, migration audits, and benchmark design on Claude Code, Claude Cowork, and Codex.

plugins.name: outcome-engine
plugins.description: Turn unclear goals into verified outcomes across research, writing, operations, creative work, personal planning, and software.

plugins.name: operating-graph
plugins.description: Design, run, inspect, and safely reorganize adaptive agent operating graphs.

plugins.name: proofloop
plugins.description: Governed agent learning ledger and evaluation wrapper with bounded refinement, verification, quarantined memory, and read-only audit.

plugins.name: strategy-room
plugins.description: Pre-commitment interviews, assumption challenge, option generation, decision synthesis, and uncertainty tracking.

plugins.name: video-production-studio
plugins.description: End-to-end routing, prompting, production, captions, graphics, runtime implementation, and delivery checks for video.

plugins.name: web-product-studio
plugins.description: Route, build, redesign, implement from images, and verify web products with one visual authority on Claude Code, Claude Cowork, or Codex.

plugins.name: writing-quality
plugins.description: Intent-aware drafting, rewriting, detect-only review, claim boundaries, and final prose validation.
